title: Fix Time Distortions: - Use Anchors: Connect Events to Specific Dates or Milestones
subtitle: Anchor Your Timeline
description:
To fix time distortions:
- Use anchors: Connect events to specific dates or milestones.
- Journal regularly: Write down events as they happen to track their timing.
- Review your calendar: Check past schedules to confirm when things actually happened.

Example: If you’re unsure when you last met a client, refer to your notes or calendar to avoid assuming it was more recent or distant.

howTo.title: Define the metric baseline
howTo.summary: Identify how often you hesitate when recalling event dates. Track instances over a week to establish a baseline for improvement.

howTo.title: Create your first anchors
howTo.summary: Select a few uncertain past events and create anchors in the Brali LifeOS app. Include a specific date and a brief context for each.

howTo.title: Attach artifacts to anchors
howTo.summary: Enhance your anchors by attaching relevant artifacts like receipts or photos. This increases their retrievability and accuracy.

howTo.title: Schedule a weekly review
howTo.summary: Set aside 10 minutes each week to review your anchors. Decide on follow-ups and ensure your anchors remain relevant.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your progress and results in the Brali LifeOS app. Visit https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/fix-time-distortions-with-anchors/ to track your improvements.
